title: cyperus cyperinus subsp. laxatus
intro: Cyperus cyperinus subsp. laxatus, also known as the loose-flowered flat-sedge or soft cyperus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus cyperinus subsp. laxatus include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. It is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
